## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential Managing Director role for Branko at Marcel's rapidly growing AI-powered content marketing company.](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company is experiencing explosive growth (52 deals, $6.2M ARR) with a unique AI-powered content service model](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Seeking top talent for Managing Director roles to lead client relationships and guide strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Aiming to build out specialized functions (e.g. healthcare vertical) and expand into new service areas](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Heavy focus on proprietary AI/ML development to create unique workflows and data assets](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Flexible on remote work, targeting April 7th start date for Branko](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2531.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Growth

  - [Recently closed 5 deals in a week, now at 52 total accounts](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Current ARR of $6.2M, projecting $10M by Q2 and $20-25M by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Attracting significant investor interest (A16Z, Iconic, Bessemer) for potential Series A](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)
  - [Unique model blending high-touch service with proprietary AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [38 current accounts managed by one Managing Director (Kyle) - actively scaling team](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

### Role of Managing Director

  - [Own book of business and drive account growth](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Build practices/workflows to improve service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Develop educational content for internal teams and external marketing](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Guide strategy for AI-powered content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Potential to specialize in verticals (e.g. healthcare) or expand service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Mix of client-facing and behind-the-scenes strategic work](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### Technology and Engineering Focus

  - [Building proprietary "Content OS", task hub, and AI workflow engine](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Hiring top-tier principal engineers from companies like Airbnb, Stripe, ClickUp](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Long-term vision to create "Cursor for knowledge work" - AI-assisted workflows](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Collecting valuable workflow/feedback data to train specialized AI models](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [Exploring applications beyond content (e.g. hiring, sales, product marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)

### Company Culture and Structure

  - [Remote-friendly with office in SF (acquiring 6,900 sq ft space)](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2821.0)
  - [International team across 15+ countries](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Plans for in-office studio for content production](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2821.0)
  - [Emphasis on thought leadership and community building (e.g. AI-led Growth summit)](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2652.0)

### Compensation and Start Date

  - [Competitive base + equity package](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2774.0)
  - [Considering sign-on bonus to account for Branko's existing content](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2780.0)
  - [Targeting April 7th start date, flexible on exact timing](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2531.0)
  - [Request for professional reference](https://fathom.video/share/nWtYbQmkQs3k4vuV2aatYK1xRftzWg8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=3336.0)
